tiles.title: Ceramic Blue Wave
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile with ocean blue wave pattern. Perfect for bathroom and kitchen backsplash. High durability and water resistant.

tiles.title: Marble White Gold
tiles.description: Luxury marble tile with gold veining. Adds elegance to any space. Ideal for living rooms and feature walls.

tiles.title: Geometric Hexagon
tiles.description: Modern hexagonal tile in matte finish. Creates stunning geometric patterns. Perfect for contemporary spaces.

tiles.title: Moroccan Pattern
tiles.description: Traditional Moroccan-inspired tile with intricate patterns. Adds bohemian charm to any room.

tiles.title: Wood Plank Porcelain
tiles.description: Wood-look porcelain tile with realistic grain. Waterproof and durable. Perfect for rustic and farmhouse styles.

tiles.title: Terrazzo Pastel
tiles.description: Colorful terrazzo tile with pastel chips. Trendy and fun. Great for modern kitchens and kids rooms.
